title: DroneDeploy Export
description: Schema describing a DroneDeploy Export as returned by the GraphQL API (exports connection on a MapPlan, and the createExport mutation payload).

id.description: Opaque global GraphQL ID. Example: Export:5ab169ed8904ec000136eac9.

downloadPath.description: Populated when status is COMPLETE; null while processing.

layer.description: Required input. The data layer to export.

merge.description: When multiple tiles exist, whether to merge into a single output file.

contourInterval.description: Elevation contour interval (meters or feet, depending on plan settings).

fileFormat.description: Output file format (GEOTIFF, PDF, SHP, LAS, etc.).

resolution.description: Ground sample distance / output resolution in cm/pixel.
